units.funding_*: decimal fraction for the named interval; annualized fields use simple annualization
units.open_interest_base: base-asset units for the named venue

perpetual.coverage: okx+hyperliquid; partial observable venues, not global market
venue_errors: Binance 在此自動化執行環境受地區限制（HTTP 451），已切換備援來源

dated_future.selection_rule: listed monthly expiry closest to 90 days

cme_proxy.limitation: Yahoo front-month proxy; contract roll and delay mean it is context, not an execution price

options.coverage: Deribit BTC/ETH 幣本位期權子集；不含 USDC 期權，也不代表全球期權市場
options.open_interest_usd_basis: 逐合約未平倉量 × estimated_delivery_price；若缺值才使用 underlying_price
limits: Max pain is a descriptive OI concentration, not a price target
Put/call OI does not identify trade direction or buyer/seller intent

collector_errors: Binance 現貨 在此自動化執行環境受地區限制（HTTP 451），已切換備援來源

btc_thesis.framework: BTC non-sovereign monetary anchor and neutral-collateral thesis
btc_thesis.model_policy: Structural adoption evidence only; never enters the short-horizon BTC bottom score or directly releases a trade gate

degradations: Stablecoin and RWA providers expose no uniform upstream observation timestamp
Public-company treasury aggregation exposes retrieval time rather than upstream filing time

gold_monetization.plain_read: BTC 目前約為黃金代理總值的 4.6%；代表貨幣化空間仍大，但情境價不是預測，也不代表需要等額資金流入。
limits: Gold market value is a scenario proxy: Yahoo COMEX front-month price multiplied by World Gold Council above-ground stock; it is not an investable market-cap series

digital_dollar_competition.plain_read: 可比美元穩定幣供給近月減少 1.9%；RWA 只有當期規模，不能據此宣稱整體鏈上信用正在擴張。
limits: Stablecoin supply is DefiLlama's peggedUSD aggregation, not bank deposits or transaction volume; 30-day change uses only assets with both current and prior-month values
RWA TVL is the sum of protocols classified as RWA by DefiLlama and may contain provider taxonomy or double-counting risk
Stablecoin and RWA scale are reported separately and are never added together

public_company_adoption.plain_read: CoinGecko 公開公司樣本持有約 6.4% BTC 供給；其中最大公司占樣本 65.7%，採用已有規模但集中度仍高。
public_company_adoption.limitation: Only CoinGecko's public-company treasury set; excludes private companies, ETFs, governments, custodians and collateral reuse

security_consensus.limitation: Hashrate is a network-security and miner-commitment proxy, not a direct price or adoption signal
security_consensus.plain_read: 算力較 30 日前 -4.1%，仍為 90 日高點的 82.0%；這只是網路安全投入的代理，不預測價格。

sovereign_credit_competition.limitation: Debt/GDP is a slow structural sovereign-credit proxy; the 10-year real yield is a cyclical opportunity-cost proxy. Neither is a direct BTC timing signal
sovereign_credit_competition.state: 結構壓力高、週期逆風高
sovereign_credit_competition.plain_read: 美國聯邦債務占 GDP 122.6%，只提供主權信用壓力背景；10 年實質利率 2.31% 則提高持有無現金流 BTC 的機會成本。

unmeasured_falsifier.name: 全球金融機構以 BTC 作抵押品的存量
unmeasured_falsifier.plain_read: ETF、DAT 與衍生品只能證明持有和金融化，不能證明銀行或全球信用市場已把 BTC 當中立抵押品。

breadth.plain_read: 追蹤資產中 7/7 上漲；領漲 ETH，只代表 24 小時相對強弱。

sector_rotation.plain_read: 賽道領先為 Layer 1；CoinGecko 分類口徑只作輪動背景。

asset_rotation.plain_read: 24 小時相對強勢；仍需成交量與衍生品確認，不能直接追價。

quality.policy: 缺失或分歧資料維持未知；場域觀測不得外推為全球市場。
